title: Prosecutions of Trump’s foes add to GOP’s headaches in midterms
description: Charges against former FBI director James B. Comey and others take focus away from the economy and other issues voters care about, many Republicans say.

title: Trump is a target of political violence, but he’s hardly its only cause
description: Social upheaval, deep polarization and social media are primary drivers of the phenomenon, which has touched Republicans and Democrats alike.

title: Trump to host Artemis astronauts, as he eyes more trips to the moon — and Mars
description: The president is celebrating investments he made in his first term that needed years to pay off, as he continues to seek “American dominance in space.”

title: Party infighting and revolts continue to complicate House Speaker Mike Johnson's job
description: House Speaker Mike Johnson is trying to pass several major pieces of legislation, but party infighting has complicated his job -- and by extension the GOP's agenda.

title: Trump welcomes King Charles III and Queen Camilla for state dinner
description: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump welcomed Britain’s King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the White House for a state dinner in the East Room.

title: King Charles urges checks on executive power as Trump hosts royal visit
description: In a speech to Congress, the monarch avoided naming the president but highlighted democratic norms, Ukraine and Western unity.

title: James Comey indicted over 2025 social media post allegedly threatening Trump
description: The former FBI director shared a photo showing seashells arranged to write out “86 47,” which some saw as a call for violence against President Donald Trump.

title: Former Fauci aide charged in alleged effort to thwart pandemic inquiries
description: David M. Morens, who was charged in an indictment unsealed this week, has previously acknowledged efforts to shield his communications from federal public records laws.

title: Image of Trump to be featured inside new passports to mark America’s 250th
description: The president’s likeness — along with Declaration of Independence text and the American flag — will be on an inside page of at least some new passports.

title: FCC orders early license renewal for ABC stations following Kimmel's first lady joke
description: The Federal Communications Commission has ordered Disney's ABC to seek early broadcast license renewals for the eight TV stations it owns amid backlash over Jimmy Kimmel's joke about Melania Trump.

title: Grand jury indicts former FBI director James Comey for a second time
description: The case revolves around a photo the former FBI director posted online last year of seashells on a beach arranged to say "8647."

title: Trump's 'American flag blue' reflecting pool project gets a mixed reaction in D.C.
description: The pool is being resurfaced in a shade more akin to that of a swimming pool. It's one of many physical changes Trump is planning for the nation's capital.

title: DOJ cites attack, ‘Trump Derangement Syndrome’ in seeking ballroom approval
description: The legal filing, which resembles Trump’s Truth Social posts, comes as the president and his allies ramp up their efforts to complete the project.

title: GAO agrees to review Justice Department’s handling of Epstein files
description: The review by the Government Accountability Office, an independent agency that is part of the legislative branch, will look into how the department released the files.

title: A Supreme Court justice’s personal ties to Haiti highlight stakes in asylum case
description: The court is considering President Donald Trump’s effort to end temporary protected status for Haitians. Justice Amy Coney Barrett has two adopted children from Haiti.

title: Deadlock over Iran's nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz cripples peace efforts
description: Two months after the U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran started the war, peace talks are on hold, with control of the Strait of Hormuz and the future of Iran's nuclear program as the two main points of contention.

title: Stuck in limbo: millions of professionals risk losing legal status under Trump pause
description: Their experiences — of sudden financial insecurity, months of unemployment, and crippling anxiety — come as the administration seeks to restrict legal migration and boost mass deportation.

title: King Charles argues for stronger cooperation in speech to a joint meeting of Congress
description: "The challenges we face are too great for any one nation to bear alone," King Charles told lawmakers Tuesday as part of a visit to mark the 250th anniversary of U.S. independence from Great Britain.

title: Could King Charles' Washington visit help mend U.S.-British relations?
description: NPR's A Martinez speaks with Shannon Felton Spence, a former manager of high-profile diplomatic and political engagements for the British government, about King Charles' visit to Washington.

title: DeSantis calls back lawmakers for Florida redistricting effort
description: Florida's Republican governor, Ron DeSantis, has called lawmakers back to Tallahassee, where they could redraw the state's congressional maps to be even more favorable for the GOP.

title: White House to review security in light of shooting at correspondents’ dinner
description: “If adjustments need to be made to protect the president, they will be made,” White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt told reporters Monday.

title: Absent GOP congressman says he’s dealing with ‘medical issue’ in vague statement
description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. of New Jersey said he will make a complete recovery but did not specify why he is missing or when he’ll return to work.

title: Correspondents’ dinner suspect charged with attempting to assassinate Trump
description: Cole Tomas Allen faces a potential life sentence, and prosecutors said he could face more charges.

title: House may scrap DHS funding bill, likely extending agency’s shutdown
description: House Speaker Mike Johnson argued the Senate’s bill includes “problematic language” that would “orphan” the agency’s immigration operations.

title: Mapping where the redistricting fight stands and where it’s headed
description: As Trump pushes for a more Republican-friendly House map, more than half a dozen states are potential targets for mid-decade tweaks to congressional boundaries.

title: King Charles’s rare state visit offers U.K. a chance to mend ties with Trump
description: The pageantry began Monday amid heightened security concerns and a growing rift over the Iran war. The U.K. hopes the president’s love of pomp and the king’s “poker face” can help heal their alliance.

title: Blanche accuses media of fueling rhetoric that leads to violence
Correspondents’ dinner shooting suspect charged with attempting to assassinate the president, two other felonies
description: In a message sent to family members, the 31-year-old suspect called himself a “friendly federal assassin” and criticized the Trump administration.

title: Supreme Court considers blocking lawsuits alleging weed killer causes cancer
description: Thousands of cancer victims allege Roundup was responsible for their illness, in one of the largest waves of product liability litigation in U.S. history.

DeSantis floats Florida map that could give GOP up to four more House seats
description: The redistricting plan proposed by Gov. Ron DeSantis, if approved, would let Republicans regain their lead in the national gerrymandering arms race.

description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.
